ddls:
CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the precinct */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the precinct */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the precinct */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the precinct */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the precinct in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accidents" (
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the accident occurred */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week the accident occurred */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Precinct where the accident occurred */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the accident (e.g., date range) */,
  "all_collisions" INTEGER /* Total number of collisions */,
  "injury_collisions" INTEGER /* Number of injury collisions */,
  "fatal_collisions" INTEGER /* Number of fatal collisions */,
  "injures" INTEGER /* Number of injuries */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities */,
  "cyclists_involved" INTEGER /* Number of cyclists involved */,
  "pedestrians_involved" INTEGER /* Number of pedestrians involved */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the accident */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Road conditions during the accident */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day when the accident occurred */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week when the accident occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, precinct official) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the accident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the accident type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collision_types" (
  "collision_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collision type */,
  "collision_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the collision type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collision type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collision_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cyclist_involved" (
  "cyclist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cyclist */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident the cyclist was involved in */,
  "number_of_cyclists" INTEGER /* Number of cyclists involved in the accident */,
  "cyclist_age" INTEGER /* Age of the cyclist */,
  "cyclist_sex" TEXT /* Sex of the cyclist */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained by the cyclist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cyclist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cyclist_involved_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pedestrian_involved" (
  "pedestrian_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pedestrian */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident the pedestrian was involved in */,
  "number_of_pedestrians" INTEGER /* Number of pedestrians involved in the accident */,
  "pedestrian_age" INTEGER /* Age of the pedestrian */,
  "pedestrian_sex" TEXT /* Sex of the pedestrian */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained by the pedestrian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pedestrian_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pedestrian_involved_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident the injury resulted from */,
  "number_of_injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries resulting from the accident */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fatalities" (
  "fatality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fatality */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident the fatality resulted from */,
  "number_of_fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities resulting from the accident */,
  "fatality_cause" TEXT /* Cause of the fatality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fatality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fatalities_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the accident data */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the accident data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the accident data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_involved" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident the vehicle was involved in */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle */,
  "vehicle_license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_involved_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
